title: French hospitals at 'tipping point' after seven days of heatwave
subhed: Emergency services saw the health consequences of the heatwave accelerate within 24 hours, between Wednesday and Thursday. The prime minister activated level 3 of the ORSAN plan, which is designed to increase hospital staffing levels.

Ukraine's Donbas rear area, from Sloviansk to Kramatorsk, is under constant Russian pressure
subhed: 'Donbas: The War of Attrition' (1/2). Just a few kilometers from one of Ukraine's fiercest fronts, these two cities are under drone strikes that make residents' lives very difficult. Both civilians and soldiers fear the bombings will intensify.

title: How cities in Africa are adapting to intense and deadly heat
subhed: Reflective paints, green roofs, work breaks: Many African countries are seeking innovative ways to cope with increasingly extreme temperatures.

title: Dayot Upamecano, the leader of the French defense, faces the Haaland menace at the 2026 World Cup
subhed: Upamecano, who plays for Bayern Munich, faces the daunting task of limiting Manchester City striker Erling Haaland's influence on Friday, in the high-stakes match between France and Norway.

title: Musée d'Orsay faces demand for restitution of Van Gogh painting
subhed: The descendant of a German Jewish art collector persecuted by the Nazis is seeking the return of the painting 'Hôpital Saint-Paul à Saint-Rémy-de-Provence.' The Commission for the Compensation of Victims of Spoliation is expected to review the case starting in September.

France faces unprecedented heatwave: 'We are about to experience four of the hottest days ever recorded in the country'
subhed: A prolonged heatwave, rather than a brief spike, has arrived. Unusually high temperatures are set to persist across the country until at least the end of this week, exposing more than 90% of the French population to extreme and rare heat.

title: Serving a husband, God and America: Young female conservatives gather at San Antonio's Turning Point summit
subhed: In early June, around 3,000 women attended the Women's Leadership Summit in San Antonio, Texas. This annual event brings together a variety of conservative figures and influencers, relying on the extensive network of Turning Point USA, founded by right-wing activist Charlie Kirk, who was murdered in 2025. After convincing a majority of young men to vote for Trump in 2024, the organization now targets female voters from Gen Z.

title: 'Impossible to sleep': A night in sweltering France, in search of a cool spot
subhed: With a heatwave bearing down, the French have taken to living after dark, chasing relief from the sun's lingering grip. From Paris to Saint-Malo, by way of Orléans, parks and pools stirred to life as soon as the day ended.
